_comment: The community skill registry — installable, namespaced skills that live in their authors' repos. Add yours via PR (see community/README.md); CI fetches and validates every entry (SkillSpec conformance + security-pattern scan) before merge. Served by the hosted worker at /v1/community and by the MCP search_skills tool alongside the core library. Also accepts PACKS: bench packs (Boardroom executive panels) and Gym scenarios — type bench|scenario, a much lower contribution bar than a full skill.

skills.name: mohitagw15856/podcast-guest-pitch
skills.description: Pitch yourself as a podcast guest — a host-first email that shows you know the show, three episode-ready angles, and the proof you can talk. Produces the pitch email, angles with talking points, and a speaker one-sheet.
